headline: HP (HPQ) Is Up 10.4% After Partnering With OpenAI To Power Its Future Of Work
summary: In late June 2026, HP Inc. announced a new global partnership with OpenAI to deploy the Frontier platform across its devices, customer-facing channels, and internal operations as part of its Future of Work and edge AI strategy. By combining OpenAI’s agent-based Frontier capabilities with HP’s Workforce Experience Platform and AI-focused devices, the company is aiming to create a more unified, AI-enhanced experience for customers, partners, and employees across its entire ecosystem. Next,...

headline: HP (HPQ) Looks Fully Valued On OpenAI Deal And Earnings Beat
summary: HP (HPQ) is in focus after reporting year-on-year revenue growth, with earnings and full-year guidance above analyst expectations, alongside a new OpenAI Frontier partnership aimed at expanding AI driven solutions across its operations. See our latest analysis for HP. HP’s recent OpenAI Frontier partnership and revenue growth come after a mixed stretch for investors, with the share price at US$24.22 and a 90 day share price return of 32.64% contrasting with a relatively flat 1 year total...

headline: HP Is A High Yielding Undervalued Tech Stock (Technical Analysis)
summary: HP (HPQ) looks like an undervalued, high-yield tech stock: bullish technicals, rising EPS estimates, and a covered 5% dividend. See more here.
